title: GPF: sqlrun.c:3310 musta forgotten branch copy of set no ssl for fref
description:
The query:

PREFIX r: <http://ruian.linked.opendata.cz/ontology/>
prefix s: <http://schema.org/>
select distinct count(?name) where {
  ?ulice rdf:type r:Ulice;
        s:name ?name.
}
crashes our Virtuoso instance based on 8173801
Instance data (7,5GB)

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE ulice (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO ulice (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Main Street'), (2, 'Second Avenue'), (3, NULL);
CREATE TABLE street_info (street_id INT, description TEXT, FOREIGN KEY (street_id) REFERENCES ulice(id));
INSERT INTO street_info (street_id, description) VALUES (1, 'A busy street'), (2, 'A quiet avenue'), (3, '');
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT name) FROM ulice WHERE name IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: set no ssl for fref in SQL query
